---
title: "Custom modules"
execute:
  eval: false
---

This page contains all code of the custom modules developed for the manuscript. 

## derive_predictions
```{python}
{{< include functions/derive_predictions.py >}}
```

## emg_processing
```{python}
{{< include functions/emg_processing.py >}}
```

## helpers
```{python}
{{< include functions/helpers.py >}}
```

## hillmodel
```{python}
{{< include functions/hillmodel.py >}}
```

## preprocess
```{python}
{{< include functions/preprocess.py >}}
```

## signal_processing
```{python}
{{< include functions/signal_processing.py >}}
```

## stats
```{python}
{{< include functions/stats.py >}}
```

## trajectories
```{python}
{{< include functions/trajectories.py >}}
```
